review.note: Refs: Wikipedia, SheetMusicSinger, TraditionalMusicPDF. Title, attribution, opening lyric identity, and common version verified. Source still uses sidecar lyrics rather than embedded XML lyric tags, but the opening enters the expected main tune after a short initial rest. Runtime fallback BPM 96 kept because source tempo is missing.Issues: sidecar-lyrics-source | tempo-missing-fallback-96.
